description: Community-curated contact list for Ward 23 (Glenvista area), Johannesburg South. Compiled and maintained by local residents via WhatsApp group.
notes: All phone numbers captured as-is from the PDF.
WhatsApp number set equal to phone number where only one number was provided.
Businesses inserted with status=pending — admin must review before making live.
Slugs may need review where business name was a person's first name only.
Some entries had duplicate phone numbers (e.g. Thabani Plumbing shares number with Johan Waterproofing — verify).
Pool Service Kevin had no phone number in source list — excluded.
Doug Cupboards had two numbers — primary and secondary both captured.
